# Pull Request

## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security improvement

## Checklist:
- [ ] My changes follow the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own changes
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added both English and Persian translations (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added references or sources for security recommendations

## Security Impact
If this PR includes security-related changes, please describe:
- What security issue does this address?
- What is the severity? (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
- Are there any breaking changes?

## Additional Notes
Add any other context about the pull request here.
